codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking regression by routing both prefixed issue pages through the shared `shouldSyncCompanySelectionFromRoute` guard. The route company still drives company-scoped queries for deep links and prefixed browsing, while manual company switches no longer get overwritten before remembered-path navigation can complete.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature metadata, transcript skeleton, handoff, `web-runtime-worker` skill, prior failed review, original failing commit `92e05d294e3292ff4def82568bcb24f8ec3212a2`, and fix commit `2c372326e81cee085eb1b3306d41f7e2291eabe9`. The new change appears to fully address the earlier scrutiny failure: both `ui/src/pages/Issues.tsx` and `ui/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx` now reuse the existing route-sync guard, preserving the original route-owned company query behavior without reintroducing the manual-switch snap-back regression.
